title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 16 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 16 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 16 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/12/2025
Today, DCE iron ore prices trended stronger, with the most-traded contract I2605 closing at 761 yuan, up 1.06% fromthe previous working day. Spot prices rose 3-5 yuan/mt from the previous day. Traders sold at market prices; steel mills purchased as needed, with inquiry volume moderate.
